summary.en: P&G's flagship outside-in open-innovation programme, launched 2000 by then-CEO A.G. Lafley to combat a multi-quarter share-price slide. Goal: 50% of P&G's innovations sourced from outside the firm (vs ~15% historically). Met in 2007. R&D productivity rose 85% on roughly flat R&D spend. Three 'bridges' do the work: technology entrepreneurs (P&G scientists scouting outside), internet platforms like InnoCentive, and YourEncore.com (re-engaged retired industry scientists). Olay Regenerist, Mr. Clean Magic Eraser, and Crest SpinBrush all shipped via Connect & Develop. The case shows the asymmetric BMC pair — closed-R&D archetype (pre-2000) vs Connect & Develop variant — that codifies the outside-in sub-type of Open Business Models.
summary.zh: 宝洁(P&G)旗舰级的「由外而内」开放式创新项目,2000 年由当时 CEO A.G. Lafley 在公司股价持续下滑中启动。目标:让宝洁 50% 的创新来自公司外部(此前约 15%)。2007 年达成。研发投入大致持平的情况下,研发产出率提升 85%。三座「桥」承担了主要工作:技术企业家(宝洁内部科学家在外部寻找)、像 InnoCentive 这样的互联网平台,以及让退休行业科学家重新接入的 YourEncore.com。Olay 新生美肌、洁霸魔力擦,以及佳洁士 SpinBrush 牙刷,都经由 Connect & Develop 渠道送进市场。本案例呈现了那对不对称 BMC —— 封闭式研发原型(2000 年前)对比 Connect & Develop 变体 —— 把开放式商业模式中「由外而内」子类型的机制讲清楚。

sources.label: Larry Huston & Nabil Sakkab · 'Connect and Develop: Inside Procter & Gamble's New Model for Innovation' · Harvard Business Review · March 2006
Henry Chesbrough · Open Business Models: How to Thrive in the New Innovation Landscape · Harvard Business Review Press · 2006
Osterwalder & Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley · 2010 (Pattern No. 5, pp. 110-111)
A.G. Lafley & Ram Charan · The Game-Changer · Crown Business · 2008
